response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct executive leadership in agentic AI or fintech. Her background in event-driven systems and real-time data is relevant, though her experience does not fully align with the scale, regulatory complexity, or multi-agent AI production requirements of the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems, including high-throughput microservices.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and open-source geo-data platforms with real-time capabilities.
Diverse technical background spanning fintech-adjacent domains (e.g., pricing optimization, investment platforms) and regulated environments.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+ or owning architectural governance at a CTO level).
Limited demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes or regulated fintech contexts.
Fintech infrastructure expertise (e.g., credit systems, liquidity optimization) is peripheral rather than core to her career.
